contraindication: contraindication: drug should not be used in patients with this condition due to safety risks.
disease_disease: disease_disease association: two diseases are known to be related.

disease_phenotype_positive: disease_phenotype_positive: disease is associated with the presence of this phenotype.
drug_drug: drug_drug interaction: two drugs are known to interact.
drug_effect: drug_effect: drug is known to produce this clinical effect.

indication: indication: drug is clinically indicated for the treatment of disease.
off-label use: off-label use: drug is sometimes used clinically for an indication outside of its approved label.
